scripts.setup: cp app/.env.example app/.env 2>/dev/null || true && cp server/.env.example server/.env 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.secrets:encrypt: node scripts/secrets-crypto.mjs encrypt app/.env app/.env.enc && node scripts/secrets-crypto.mjs encrypt server/.env server/.env.enc
scripts.secrets:decrypt: node scripts/secrets-crypto.mjs decrypt app/.env.enc app/.env && node scripts/secrets-crypto.mjs decrypt server/.env.enc server/.env
scripts.dev: npm run doctor && npm run secrets:auto:ensure && npm run security:env-check && npm run ports:free && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm -w server run dev" "npm -w app run start:ci"
scripts.server: npm run secrets:auto:ensure && npm run security:env-check && npm -w server run dev
scripts.server:start: npm run secrets:auto:ensure && npm run security:env-check && npm -w server start
scripts.app: npm run secrets:auto:ensure && npm run security:env-check && npm -w app start
